testimonial.title: WHAT OUR CLIENTS SAY
testimonial.desc: Companies and individuals who have worked with us highly appreciate the quality of our work and our professionalism.

client1.name: Qayumov Dilshod
client1.text: The product is very high quality and easily meets global market requirements.

client2.name: Hasanov Zafar
client2.text: The service is also excellent. There were no issues with product delivery.

client3.name: Keldiyorov Samandar

about.title: About Us
about.description: NeftGasProm is a local company registered in Tashkent, specializing in the production of waterproofing materials. It manufactures bitumen and bitumen-polymer based products, providing reliable protection of structures against moisture and water exposure. Through modern technologies and strict quality standards, we continue to achieve stable results.

product1.name: BITUMEN MASTIC №1
product1.desc: Professional waterproofing mastic. Available in 9 kg buckets. 100% protection from moisture and water.

product2.name: POLYMER-BITUMEN MASTIC
product2.desc: Highly elastic and heat-resistant. Ideal for construction and roofing.

product3.name: WATERPROOF COATING
product3.desc: Water-resistant coating. Specially designed for concrete and metal surfaces.

product4.name: BITUMEN PRIMER
product4.desc: Surface preparation primer. Essential for better adhesion of materials.

aboutPage.label: About Us
aboutPage.title: Experience, trust, and a modern approach in construction
aboutPage.description: Our company has been implementing major industrial and infrastructure projects with quality, clear planning, and modern technologies. Every project is a symbol of responsibility and trust for us.

badge.title: Reliable Partner
badge.text: We value quality and deadlines equally

experience.title: More than 18 years of practical experience

story.label: Our History
story.title: Our company’s activity and development path
story.text1: Throughout our activity, we have completed many important construction and installation projects. In every project, we strictly follow technical accuracy, safety, and quality requirements.
story.text2: Our team relies on experienced specialists, effective management, and a strong practical base. That is why we can deliver reliable results even on large-scale facilities.

quality.title: High Quality
quality.text: Every project is carried out according to modern standards and strict control.

experience.title: Practical Experience
experience.text: Many years of experience and real large-scale projects are our main advantage.

approach.title: Systematic Approach
approach.text: All processes, from planning to delivery, are carefully managed.

values.label: Our Values
values.title: Our Work Principles
values.text: In our activities, we consider honesty, responsibility, quality, and continuous development as the main criteria.

items.item2: Strict adherence to deadlines and quality
items.item3: Open and reliable communication with the client

miniCard.title: Our Goal
miniCard.text: To deliver strong results in the construction industry as a reliable, modern, and long-term partner.
